title: Nilla
description: Nilla is a modpack focusing on the aspect of enhancing vanilla Minecraft.
body:
Nilla is a modpack focusing on the aspect of enhancing vanilla Minecraft.   
We **recommend** to **NOT** use this modpack on public servers due to some public servers having rules against the use of certain mods.
### PROBLEMS:   
None atm
### Mod list:   
Sodium   
Iris Shaders   
Lithium   
Mod Menu   
Indium   
LambDynamicLights   
AppleSkin   
Inspecio   
LambdaBetterGrass   
Inventory Profiles Next   
Entity Culling   
FerriteCore   
Memory Leak Fix   
Dynamic FPS   
Animatica   
Continuity   
Custom LAN   
FabricSkyboxes   
More Block Predicates   
More Culling   
More Culling Extra   
Blanket   
Quilt Loading Screen   
No Telemetry   
Ok Zoomer   
Cull Less Leaves   
ImmediatelyFast   
Custom FOV   
FancyMenu

SkinShuffle   
-----Libraries-----   
Entity Texture Features   
Konkrete   
Load My Resources   
libIPN   
YetAnotherConfigLib   
Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries (QSL)   
Quilt Kotlin Libraries (QKL)   
-----Resource Packs-----   
C4Music   
Villager Variety
